title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
